Class Loop

java.lang.Object
main.Loop
Direct Known Subclasses:
MainLoop, ManagerLoop, RegisteredClientLoop, UnregisteredClientLoop
public abstract class Loop extends Object
The type Loop.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description

    appExited
    Whether the app has been exited or not

    The last chosen option when prompted

    The current screen's page number, if a list is being browsed

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    basicLoopPrinter(int firstOptionNum)
    It prints the selections: see notification, see profile, exit, go back.
    protected void
    enterPagedScreen()
    It updates the previous and current page numbers when entering a paged screen for the first time, allowing for the user to go back to the page they were viewing in the previous screen
    protected void
    exit()
    It exits the app and saves the store
    protected void
    leavePagedScreen()
    It updates the previous and current page numbers when leaving a paged screen, allowing for the user to go back to the page they were viewing in the previous screen
    protected void
    logger()
    It handles the log-in and updates the current user accordingly
    protected void
    loopSelector()
    It chooses which loop will be triggered according to the current user
    protected void
    main()
    Shortcut to the Main Loop's main() method
    protected void
    nextPageCartPack(Cart cart)
    It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing the store's list of packs
    protected void
    nextPagePrinterCategory(int optionNum)
    It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing the store's list of categories
    protected void
    nextPagePrinterDiscount(int optionNum)
    It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing the store's list of discounts
    protected void
    nextPagePrinterEmployee(int optionNum)
    It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing the store's list of employees
    protected void
    nextPagePrinterRegisteredClient(int optionNum)
    It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing the store's list of registered clients
    protected void
    nextPagePrinterReview(int optionNum, StoreProduct product)
    It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing a store product's list of reviews
    protected void
    nextPagePrinterStorePack(int optionNum)
    It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing the store's list of packs
    protected void
    nextPagePrinterStoreProduct(int optionNum, List<StoreProduct> products)
    It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing a list of store products
    protected void
    nextPageRegisteredClient()
    It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing the store's list of registered clients
    protected void
    nextPageReview(StoreProduct product)
    It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing a store product's list of reviews
    protected void
    nextPageStorePack()
    It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing the store's list of packs
    protected void
    nextPageStoreProduct(List<StoreProduct> products)
    It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing a list of store products
    protected void
    pagedLoopPrinter(int firstOptionNum)
    It prints the selections: previous page, next page, see notification, see profile, exit, go back.
    protected void
    previousPage()
    It allows for a user to switch to the previous page when viewing a list
    protected void
    previousPagePrinter(int optionNum)
    It prints the previous page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action
    protected void
    returnToPagedScreen()
    It updates the previous and current page numbers when going back to a paged screen, allowing for the user to go back to the page they were viewing in the previous screen
    protected void
    signer()
    It handles the sign-up and updates the current user accordingly

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • currentScreenPageNum

      protected static int currentScreenPageNum
      The current screen's page number, if a list is being browsed

      protected static int previousScreenPageNum
      The previous screen's page number, if a list is being browsed

      protected static User currentUser
      The apps current user

      Whether the app has been exited or not

      The last chosen option when prompted

      public Loop()

  • Method Details

    • leavePagedScreen

      protected void leavePagedScreen()
      It updates the previous and current page numbers when leaving a paged screen, allowing for the user to go back to the page they were viewing in the previous screen

    • enterPagedScreen

      protected void enterPagedScreen()
      It updates the previous and current page numbers when entering a paged screen for the first time, allowing for the user to go back to the page they were viewing in the previous screen

    • returnToPagedScreen

      protected void returnToPagedScreen()
      It updates the previous and current page numbers when going back to a paged screen, allowing for the user to go back to the page they were viewing in the previous screen

    • logger

      protected void logger() throws IOException
      It handles the log-in and updates the current user accordingly
      Throws:
      IOException - the io exception

    • signer

      protected void signer() throws IOException
      It handles the sign-up and updates the current user accordingly
      Throws:
      IOException - the io exception

    • main

      protected void main() throws IOException
      Shortcut to the Main Loop's main() method
      Throws:
      IOException - the io exception

    • loopSelector

      protected void loopSelector() throws IOException, IllegalArgumentException, NullPointerException
      It chooses which loop will be triggered according to the current user
      Throws:
      IOException - the io exception
      IllegalArgumentException - the illegal argument exception
      NullPointerException - the null pointer exception

    • exit

      protected void exit() throws IOException
      It exits the app and saves the store
      Throws:
      IOException - the io exception

    • previousPage

      protected void previousPage()
      It allows for a user to switch to the previous page when viewing a list

    • nextPageReview

      protected void nextPageReview(StoreProduct product)
      It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing a store product's list of reviews
      Parameters:
      product - the desired store products

    • nextPageStoreProduct

      protected void nextPageStoreProduct(List<StoreProduct> products)
      It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing a list of store products
      Parameters:
      products - the list of store products

    • nextPageRegisteredClient

      protected void nextPageRegisteredClient()
      It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing the store's list of registered clients

    • nextPageStorePack

      protected void nextPageStorePack()
      It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing the store's list of packs

    • nextPageCartPack

      protected void nextPageCartPack(Cart cart)
      It allows for a user to switch to the next page when viewing the store's list of packs
      Parameters:
      cart - the cart

    • previousPagePrinter

      protected void previousPagePrinter(int optionNum)
      It prints the previous page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action
      Parameters:
      optionNum - the number that will resemble the previous page action in the prompt

    • nextPagePrinterReview

      protected void nextPagePrinterReview(int optionNum, StoreProduct product)
      It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing a store product's list of reviews
      Parameters:
      optionNum - the number that will resemble the previous page action in the prompt
      product - the desired product

    • nextPagePrinterStoreProduct

      protected void nextPagePrinterStoreProduct(int optionNum, List<StoreProduct> products)
      It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing a list of store products
      Parameters:
      optionNum - the number that will resemble the previous page action in the prompt
      products - the list of products

    • nextPagePrinterRegisteredClient

      protected void nextPagePrinterRegisteredClient(int optionNum)
      It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing the store's list of registered clients
      Parameters:
      optionNum - the number that will resemble the previous page action in the prompt

    • nextPagePrinterEmployee

      protected void nextPagePrinterEmployee(int optionNum)
      It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing the store's list of employees
      Parameters:
      optionNum - the number that will resemble the previous page action in the prompt

    • nextPagePrinterStorePack

      protected void nextPagePrinterStorePack(int optionNum)
      It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing the store's list of packs
      Parameters:
      optionNum - the number that will resemble the previous page action in the prompt

    • nextPagePrinterDiscount

      protected void nextPagePrinterDiscount(int optionNum)
      It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing the store's list of discounts
      Parameters:
      optionNum - the number that will resemble the previous page action in the prompt

    • nextPagePrinterCategory

      protected void nextPagePrinterCategory(int optionNum)
      It prints the next page selection when the user is prompted to choose their next action whilst viewing the store's list of categories
      Parameters:
      optionNum - the number that will resemble the previous page action in the prompt

    • basicLoopPrinter

      protected void basicLoopPrinter(int firstOptionNum)
      It prints the selections: see notification, see profile, exit, go back. Used when prompting the user, notification and profile options will only be printed it they can be chosen by the current user
      Parameters:
      firstOptionNum - the number that will resemble the "see notifications" action in the prompt

    • pagedLoopPrinter

      protected void pagedLoopPrinter(int firstOptionNum)
      It prints the selections: previous page, next page, see notification, see profile, exit, go back. Used when prompting the user, notification and profile options will only be printed it they can be chosen by the current user
      Parameters:
      firstOptionNum - the number that will resemble the "see notifications" action in the prompt
